abort.no_configured_items: Setup cancelled: You must select at least one hardware device or create one custom meter to use this integration.

user.title: COMSYS Datenspende Setup
user.description: Choose how you want to set up {name}.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.description: Sign up for a new {name} account to get started.

advanced_options.name: Advanced options
advanced_options.description: If you received a sign-up key, you can enter it here.

household.title: Create household
household.description:
Please provide the following information for your household.
*If you do not want to share some of this information, you can leave it blank.*

main_menu.title: Configuration Menu
main_menu.description:
To get started, you need to configure what you want to monitor.
You can choose devices directly exposed by Home Assistant, or combine multiple entities into a custom meter.

device_selection.title: Hardware Devices
device_selection.description: Select the devices from which you want to donate data to {name}.

custom_meters_overview.title: Custom meters overview
custom_meters_overview.description: Select an action below to manage your custom meters.

menu_options.select_edit_custom_meter: Edit or delete an existing custom meter

select_edit_custom_meter.title: Edit custom meter
select_edit_custom_meter.description: Select the custom meter you would like to edit or delete.

create_manual_meter.title: Create custom meter
create_manual_meter.description: Group standalone entities into a single custom meter.

select_delete_custom_meter.title: Delete custom meter
select_delete_custom_meter.description: Select a custom meter to delete.

error.name_already_exists: A custom meter with this name already exists.
error.no_entities_selected: You must assign at least one entity.
error.at_least_one_entity_required: You must select at least one entity (power, energy, or voltage).

abort.no_configured_items: Configuration cancelled: You cannot save an empty setup.
